# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    service: 
      id: your_service_id
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Accept"
      exposed_headers: 
        - "X-Custom-Header"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true

  - name: cors
    route: 
      id: your_route_id
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Accept"
      exposed_headers: 
        - "X-Custom-Header"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true

  - name: basic-auth
    global: true
    config:
      hide_credentials: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: 
      id: your_service_id
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: 
      id: your_route_id
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"
